jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Sharekhan
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!
